options.name: --project
options.description: The path to a project to convert [default: ]

options.name: --workspace
options.description: The solution or project file to operate on. If a project is not specified, the command will search the current directory for one. [default: ]

options.name: --msbuild-path
options.description: The path to an MSBuild.exe, if you prefer to use that [default: ]

options.name: --target-framework
options.description: The name of the framework you would like to upgrade to. If unspecified, the default TFM for apps chosen will be the highest available one found on your machine, and the default TFM for libraries will be .NET Standard 2.0. [default: ]

options.name: --force-web-conversion
options.description: Attempt to convert MVC and WebAPI projects even though significant manual work is necessary after migrating such projects. [default: False]

options.name: --preview
options.description: Use preview SDKs as part of conversion [default: False]

options.name: --diff-only
options.description: Produces a diff of the project to convert; no conversion is done [default: False]

options.name: --no-backup
options.description: Converts projects, does not create a backup of the originals and removes packages.config file. [default: False]

options.name: --keep-current-tfms
options.description: Converts project files but does not change any TFMs. If unspecified, TFMs may change. [default: False]

options.name: --maui-conversion
options.description: Attempt to convert Xamarin.Forms Projects to .NET MAUI projects. There may be additional manual work necessary after migrating such projects. [default: False]

options.name: --update
options.description: Updates the try-convert tool to the latest available version [default: False]
